Hey, this is Russell and congratulations on investing in the virtual version of our funnel hackathon. Now, I'm excited for you to go through this experience and a lot of people ask me, what's the best way to do it, Russell? And I would recommend is number one, there's a PDF of the workbook down below. Take that PDF, I would print it out, go to Kinko's or OfficeMax or Staples, wherever you got at your hometown, print it out, and it's spiral bound or something so you have it and you can actually open up and take notes on it because I promise you're going to want it. It was built to be able to draw notes on and keep your thoughts on it. And I promise you if you use that, you're going to go back and use it over and over and over again. Natalie Hodson tells me she pulls out at least once a week when she's working on her slides or her presentations or her Facebook lives. Katelyn Pollen told me the same thing like people who have used it, they use it all the time. So I recommend printing it out, go get it, staple, spiral bound, whatever you need to be able to have access to the actual printouts. That's number one. The number two is make sure you've gone through 10X Secrets Trading first. The 10X Secrets Trading is going to teach you the framework, okay? If you have the framework and hopefully you invest in the closing secrets one, if you did, it's going to give you a whole bunch of closes throughout the whole thing. And this is all about implementation. So you have the workbook and now you can go back and implement it. So find a time, find a weekend or find a date you can block out and say, okay, this is my webinar building time. And they open the workbook, watch the first video from your first play. And as soon as you tell everyone in the workbook, like, hey, stop and go work on this, pause it, and then go do the work in the workbook. And then go back to your play, listen to the pause it and go back to the workbook and work along just like everyone who paid the $20,000 to be in the room did. If you do that, you'll get the same experience that they did after paying $20,000 to be here. So that's kind of the game plan. I'm excited for you to go through this experience. I hope that by the time you are done, you have the webinar that will help to get your mission, get your message out to more people, sell more products, make you a ton of money, and help you to change the world. Thanks again for investing and I'll see you on the training.
